headline: New Walmart soda line takes on Coca-Cola and PepsiCo
summary: The soda market has grown beyond being an indulgence. For decades, grabbing a Coke, a Pepsi, or some other flavor of soda was a treat. Now, at least for younger generations, soda has become a functional beverage. Rachel Bonsignore, vice president of consumer life at NielsenIQ (NIQ), told Beverage ...

headline: Can PepsiCo's Innovation Push Reignite its Growth in 2026?
summary: PEP bets on new functional snacks, better-for-you drinks and refreshed core brands as innovation and productivity aim to restore 2026 growth.
